title: Prefill shows TDS credit not present in 26AS — unclaimed credit risk

conflict_log_entry.user_action: TDS of ₹5,000 from TAN MUMB98765B (194J) appears in Prefill but not in 26AS. Employer/deductor may not have deposited it. Contact deductor to deposit TDS. Cannot claim credit until it appears in 26AS.

notes: This is one of the most damaging situations in tax filing: a taxpayer claims a TDS credit that is in their Prefill but not in 26AS. The CPC rejects the credit, issues a demand, and the taxpayer owes tax + interest on the difference. Jarviz must block this credit claim until the 26AS reflects it.
